inputText: Hi, I'm Maya Chen, student ID S one zero zero four two. I need to know whether I can still add Biology one oh one after the deadline, and what form I should submit.
expectedBehavior: Use the student-relations tool before answering.
Tell the student to submit the Late Add Petition.
Mention approvals instead of inventing a direct enrollment action.

transcript.sttFinal: Hi. I'm Maya Chen, student ID s 10042. I need to know whether I can still add biology one, o one after the deadline. And what form I should submit.
transcript.agentReply: Maya, you can submit a Late Add Petition through the Student Relations portal. You will need to route it to your course instructor, academic advisor, and the registrar for approval.
